# PERF-049 positive: copy(dst, src) without length validation
lang: go
file: PERF-049-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func Copy(c *gin.Context) {
	body := c.Request.Body
	buf := make([]byte, 1024)
	payload := make([]byte, 4096)
	n, _ := body.Read(payload)
	copy(buf, payload)
	c.Data(http.StatusOK, "application/octet-stream", buf[:n])
}
